name: decline-boxplot
description: Should explain box plots unsupported and render alternative
messages: Create box plots of scores grouped by subject
rubric: Box plots are not supported. Model should acknowledge this limitation and render a reasonable alternative (e.g. strip plot, histogram) showing score distribution by subject. Score higher if it explains why box plot is unavailable. Score lower if it renders without mentioning the limitation or misleadingly labels the chart as a box plot.
